title: miniMule — Mobile App
description: React Native / Expo mobile storefront and social feed for the miniMule art marketplace. Apollo Client + GraphQL with real-time cart and order management.
longDescription: A full-featured mobile application built with Expo SDK 54 and React Native 0.81. Users can browse and purchase sticker designs, follow a social feed, create posts with image uploads, manage their cart, track orders, and receive notifications. Integrates seamlessly with the miniMule GraphQL backend via Apollo Client.
